bids.reasoning: At t=0.0 there is no time pressure to concede, so I am targeting my maximum-utility bid. The opponent opened with all valueD, which is the lowest utility for me on every issue and gives no evidence yet of willingness to make balanced concessions.

I am targeting a very high-utility bid because it is still extremely early at t=0.02, so there is little reason to make major concessions yet. The opponent has improved their offer slightly for me by moving issueA from valueD to valueC, but their bids are still far from attractive, so I will only concede on my lowest-weight issueD while holding firm on the more important issues.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.95 because it is still very early in the negotiation, so there is little need for major concessions yet. The opponent’s offers have improved substantially for me, especially on issueA, but they continue to push low values on issueB and issueD; I will hold firm on high-weight issues and concede further only on low-weight issueD.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.92 because it is still very early in the negotiation, so there is little need for major concessions yet. The opponent’s offers have improved substantially for me, especially on issueA and issueB, suggesting they are conceding; with no messages to weigh, I will concede only on my lowest-weight issueD for now while holding firm on higher-weight issues.

I targeted a high-utility bid around 0.89 because it is still very early (t=0.08), so there is no need to concede down to the opponent’s latest offer yet. The opponent’s offers have steadily improved for me, especially on issueA and issueB, so I will hold firm on those higher-weight issues while conceding somewhat on lower-weight issueC and issueD.

I am targeting a strong early-game utility around 0.84, since time is still only t=0.10 and there is no need to concede too far yet. The opponent has been conceding substantially toward my preferences, especially on issueA and issueB, and their latest offer is already fairly good for me; I will concede on the lower-weight issueC while holding firm on high-weight issueB.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.92 because it is still early at t=0.12, so there is no need to concede heavily yet. The opponent’s offers have improved substantially for me, especially accepting issueA=valueA and recently issueC=valueA, while they seem to want concessions on issueD and perhaps issueB; I will concede only the low-weight issueD for now and hold firm on issueB.

At t=0.14 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while keeping concessions on the least important issueD. The opponent has conceded substantially on my most important issues, with their latest offer giving me issueA=valueA and issueB=valueA, so I will hold those and ask for my preferred issueC while leaving issueD at their favored valueD.

I am targeting a high but not maximal utility bid around 0.89, since it is still early at t=0.16 and there is no need to concede down to the opponent’s latest offer yet. The opponent has clearly improved from all valueD to offers with issueA and issueB at valueA, so I will hold firm on the highest-weight issues while conceding moderately on lower-weight issueC and issueD.

I targeted a still-strong utility around 0.866 while making a modest concession from my previous bid because it is still early at t=0.18. The opponent’s offers have improved substantially for me and they previously offered this exact combination at t=0.14, so it is a plausible acceptance point while preserving my highest-weight issues A and B.
